Use Ctrl+N to quickly create a new note
Floral Notepaper supports Markdown mixed with LaTeX formulas, perfect for handling text, logic, and a little bit of academic pressure at the same time
Drag notes into a category folder to organize them
You can switch between light and dark themes in settings to suit daytime, nighttime, and moments when you don't want to be interrogated by the screen
Floral Notepaper is open source and free software. You can contribute your code on [GitHub](https://github.com/Achilng/floral-notepaper)
